name: Pilafi Tas Kebab
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Leg of lamb or veal
1 1/2 pounds Tomatoes, peeled and strained OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into 2-inch cubes.
2. Wash and dry the onions.
3. Brown the meat in two-thirds of the butter until browned.
4. Add the chopped onions and brown these as well.
5. Add wine, tomatoes (or tomato paste diluted with water), salt, and pepper.
6. Cook for about 5 minutes.
7. Add the remaining water to the mixture.
8. Continue cooking until the meat is tender and about 1 cup of sauce remains.
9. Cook rice according to package instructions.
10. Melt the remaining butter and stir it into the cooked rice.
11. Place the meat and sauce at the bottom of a tube pan or ring mold.
12. Add the rice on top, packing it lightly.
13. Turn out the assembled mixture onto a platter so that the meat is on top; the sauce will run down the sides of the rice.
